international_shipping_policy: Malidag yiyemeje gukorera abakiriya kwisi yose hamwe no kohereza ibicuruzwa mpuzamahanga byizewe. Twese tuzi akamaro ko kugerwaho no koroherezwa, niyo mpamvu twubatse umuyoboro wibikoresho bigera kumugabane wose. Aho waba uherereye hose, duharanira kwemeza ko uburambe bwawe bwo guhaha butagira ikinyabupfura kandi bukora neza. Serivisi mpuzamahanga zo kohereza ibicuruzwa zigera mu Burayi, Afurika, Aziya, Amerika, ndetse n'ahandi. Binyuze mubufatanye bwizewe kwisi yose, turashobora gutanga ubwikorezi bwigihe kandi bwizewe bwibicuruzwa byawe. Ibicuruzwa byose bicungwa neza kugirango bigumane ubuziranenge bwibicuruzwa no kwemeza kunyurwa kwabakiriya. Muri Malidag, tubona kohereza ibicuruzwa mpuzamahanga kuruta serivisi - ni amasezerano. Isezerano ryo gutuma ibicuruzwa byacu bigera kumuryango utandukanye kandi ugenda wiyongera. Waba uri umuguzi wambere cyangwa umukiriya ugarutse, urashobora kwitega ubuhanga, kwiringirwa, no kwitabwaho guhoraho muri buri cyiciro twujuje.
shipping_notice: Turimo kwerekana ibicuruzwa byohereza aho uherereye. Urashobora guhitamo ahantu hatandukanye muri menu iri hejuru.
learn_about_shipping: Wige ibijyanye no kohereza mpuzamahanga hano
login_to_add_to_basket: Nyamuneka injira kugirango wongere ibintu mubiseke byawe.
basket_add_failed: Kunanirwa kongeramo ikintu mubiseke. Nyamuneka gerageza.
basket_add_error: Ikosa ryabaye mugihe wongeyeho ikintu mubiseke byawe.
not_connected: 🚫 Ntabwo uhujwe. Witondere guhuza umuyoboro ushyigikiwe.
unknown_network: Network Umuyoboro utazwi. Uhujwe numuyoboro udashyigikiwe.
wallet_not_connected_warning: Umufuka wawe ntabwo uhujwe. Nyamuneka banza uhuze ikotomoni yawe.
shipping_fee: Muri Malidag, dufite intego yo gutanga amafaranga yo kohereza mu mucyo kandi arushanwe ajyanye n'aho uherereye n'imiterere y'ibicuruzwa byawe. Ibiciro byo kohereza bibarwa muburyo bugaragara mugihe cyo kugenzura, hitabwa kubintu nko kugana, uburyo bwo kohereza, uburemere bwibintu, nubunini bwo gupakira.  Dufatanya nabatwara amahanga benshi kugirango batange ibiciro byiza bihari byombi nibisanzwe byo gutanga. Mugihe cyo kugenzura, uzashobora kureba ikiguzi cyo kohereza mbere yo kurangiza kugura - ntamafaranga yihishe cyangwa amafaranga atunguranye.  Kubicuruzwa binini cyangwa birenze igipimo ntarengwa cyagaciro, turashobora gutanga ibicuruzwa byoherejwe kubuntu, bizerekanwa neza kuri cheque. Ibi bitekerezo birashobora gutandukana mukarere nigihe cyumwaka.  Niba ufite ikibazo kijyanye nigiciro cyo kohereza cyangwa kwemererwa koherezwa kubuntu, humura hamagara itsinda ryacu ridufasha. Turi hano kugirango tugufashe gufata ibyemezo byinshi kandi bidahenze kubyo ukeneye gutanga.

Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph1: Kuri Malidag, twumva ko gutanga ku gihe ari igice cyingenzi cyuburambe bwawe. Niyo mpamvu dukorana cyane nabatwara mpuzamahanga bizewe kugirango tumenye neza ko ibicuruzwa byawe bikugeraho neza kandi neza, aho waba uri hose kwisi.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph2: Igihe cyagenwe cyo gutanga kiratandukanye ukurikije aho ujya, uburyo bwo kohereza bwatoranijwe kuri cheque, hamwe nuburyo bukoreshwa bwa gasutamo. Mugihe duharanira kubahiriza ibihe bikurikira, gutinda rimwe na rimwe kubera serivisi za posita zaho cyangwa amabwiriza mpuzamahanga arashobora kubaho.
standard: Kohereza bisanzwe: Mubisanzwe bitangwa muminsi 7 kugeza 21 yakazi , ukurikije aho serivisi za posita zimeze.
express: Kohereza Express: Kugera muminsi 3 kugeza 7 yakazi kubikorwa byinshi mpuzamahanga binyuze mubitwara premium.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph3: Uzakira numero ikurikirana mugihe ibicuruzwa byawe byatumijwe, kugirango ubashe gukurikirana urugendo rwayo mugihe nyacyo. Niba paki yawe yatinze kurenza idirishya ryagereranijwe, itsinda ryacu ridufasha rihora rifasha gukemura ikibazo vuba.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph4: Nyamuneka menya ko iminsi mikuru rusange, ubugenzuzi bwa gasutamo, cyangwa uturere twa kure dushobora kongera igihe. Turasaba guhitamo kohereza ibicuruzwa byihuse-byateganijwe.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph1: Muri Malidag, dufite intego yo gutanga amafaranga yo kohereza mu mucyo kandi arushanwe ajyanye n'aho uherereye n'imiterere y'ibicuruzwa byawe. Ibiciro byo kohereza bibarwa muburyo bugaragara mugihe cyo kugenzura, hitabwa kubintu nko kugana, uburyo bwo kohereza, uburemere bwibintu, nubunini bwo gupakira.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph2: Dufatanya nabatwara mpuzamahanga benshi kugirango batange ibiciro byiza bihari byombi nibisanzwe byo gutanga. Mugihe cyo kugenzura, uzashobora kubona ikiguzi cyo kohereza mbere yo kurangiza kugura - ntamafaranga yihishe cyangwa amafaranga atunguranye.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph3: Kubicuruzwa binini cyangwa birenze igipimo ntarengwa cyagaciro, turashobora gutanga ibicuruzwa byoherejwe kubuntu , bizerekanwa neza kuri cheque. Ibi bitekerezo birashobora gutandukana mukarere nigihe cyumwaka.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph4: Niba ufite ikibazo kijyanye nigiciro cyo kohereza cyangwa kwemererwa koherezwa kubuntu, humura hamagara itsinda ryacu ridufasha. Turi hano kugirango tugufashe gufata ibyemezo byinshi kandi bidahenze kubyo ukeneye gutanga.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph1: Nyamuneka menya ko amategeko mpuzamahanga yose ashobora gutangirwa amahoro ya gasutamo, imisoro yatumijwe mu mahanga, hamwe nandi mafaranga yashyizweho n’ubuyobozi bw’ibanze. Aya mafranga ntabwo akubiye mubicuruzwa cyangwa ibicuruzwa byoherejwe byerekanwe kuri Malidag kandi birashobora gukusanywa nubuyobozi bwa gasutamo mugutanga.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph2: Nkuwayahawe, ufite inshingano zonyine zo kubahiriza amabwiriza y’igihugu cyinjira mu mahanga no kwishyura amafaranga yose akoreshwa. Turasaba kugenzura n'ibiro bya gasutamo byigihugu cyawe kugirango ubone ibisobanuro birambuye mbere yo gutanga ibicuruzwa byawe.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph3: Malidag ntabwo aryozwa amafaranga yinyongera, gutinda kwa gasutamo, cyangwa kwanga ibicuruzwa kubera imisoro itishyuwe itishyuwe cyangwa ibibazo bijyanye n’imisoro. Mugihe mugihe paki yasubijwe kubera gasutamo itishyuwe cyangwa kutayubahiriza, amafaranga yo kohereza ibicuruzwa cyangwa kugarura ibintu azakurwa mubyo wasubije.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph4: Twihatira gukora uburambe mpuzamahanga bwo guhaha byoroshye kandi bishoboka hano kandi turahari kugirango tugufashe kubibazo byose bijyanye na gasutamo cyangwa inyandiko. Nyamuneka ntutindiganye kuvugana nitsinda ryacu ridufasha mbere cyangwa nyuma yo kugura.
language_change_body_1: Muguhindura ururimi, ibice byose bya porogaramu harimo amazina yibicuruzwa, isubiramo, nibirimo bizerekanwa mururimi rwatoranijwe.
language_change_body_2: Ururimi kavukire rwiyi porogaramu ni Icyongereza.
language_change_body_4: Nyamuneka injira kugirango umenye neza ko ururimi rwawe rwabitswe mu masomo.
important_ reminder: Menya ibicuruzwa byacu by'ingenzi kandi ugure ibicuruzwa byacu
